markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO strategy, content creation, and lead generation efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is on track, with 440 articles developed and a plan to clear the backlog](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Lead generation from blog content has significantly decreased in recent months, raising concerns](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [There's a need to refine keyword targeting and create more relevant lead magnets for specific blog topics](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [The team will transition from using fake author profiles to employee profiles for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Page views for the blog showed an upward trend earlier in the year but have recently plateaued](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Publishing

  - [440 articles developed to date](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [10 articles from previous week's backlog published](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Plan to publish 20 articles (10 from current week + 10 from next week) before next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [New process: Prateek to share weekly update on GrowthX channel with links to published articles](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### Lead Generation Analysis

  - [US leads increased from 1-2 to 6 per month since engagement started](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [January 2025: 38 leads from US, 19 from India, 7 from UK, 4 from Canada](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Concerning trend: Very few leads generated from blog posts published after September](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Action items:](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
    1.  Identify highly relevant keywords for Firework's brand
    2.  Create topic-specific lead magnets (e.g., infographics, e-books) for each blog post

### SEO Performance Metrics

  - [Impressions increased by 10% to 490k (up from 470k last week)](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Clicks showed weak growth, increasing by about 1,000](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [Team to investigate reasons behind the recent decline in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

### Author Profiles for Blog Posts

  - [Decision to transition from fake profiles to employee profiles](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Concerns raised about maintaining consistency if employees leave](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Action item: Cameron to test updating author profiles on 5 recent blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)

### Blog Page Views Analysis

  - [Overall upward trend since the beginning of the year](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Strong performance in March (reason to be investigated)](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Recent plateau/decline in page views since mid-May](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
  - [Prateek to analyze organic search traffic separately from overall page views](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)

### Multilingual Content Strategy

  - [Plan to implement language switcher for blog posts (English, French, Spanish)](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1969.0)
  - [Cameron to work on technical implementation next week](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)
  - [Challenge: Ensuring accurate translations for all blog content](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2115.0)
  - [Proposed solution: Start with translating top 10-30 articles, potentially using AI with human review](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to share detailed lead generation analysis on GrowthX channel, tagging Abhishek](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [Investigate reasons behind recent decline in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Create list of employee profiles to use for blog authorship](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Cameron to test updating author profiles on 5 recent blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
  - [Analyze March traffic spike and recent page view plateau](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Begin implementation of language switcher for blog posts, starting with top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/wvYW5VUCBdRFG89zRzrzDSG6eCewuGz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1969.0)
